/bin/c++ -fPIC -O3 -DNDEBUG -shared -Wl,-soname,libBaseController.so -o libBaseController.so CMakeFiles/BaseController.dir/BaseController_autogen/mocs_compilation.cpp.o CMakeFiles/BaseController.dir/BaseController.cpp.o   -L/usr/lib/argos3  -L/home/sara/Documents/CPFA_AHCFA_Final_Project/CPFA_Base_ARGoS-main_12min/build  -Wl,-rpath,/usr/lib/argos3:/home/sara/Documents/CPFA_AHCFA_Final_Project/CPFA_Base_ARGoS-main_12min/build -Wl,-Bstatic -ldl -lpthread -Wl,-Bdynamic -lfreeimage -lfreeimageplus -lGL -lGLU -lglut -lXmu -lXi /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libQt6OpenGLWidgets.so.6.4.2 -llua5.3 -lm -largos3core_simulator -largos3plugin_simulator_footbot -largos3plugin_simulator_genericrobot /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libQt6Widgets.so.6.4.2 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libQt6OpenGL.so.6.4.2 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libQt6Gui.so.6.4.2 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libGL.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libQt6Core.so.6.4.2
